query: Set up this project skeleton exactly as specified — everything you need is in this message, so do not ask me anything: (1) create directories src/, tests/, and docs/; (2) src/app.py must define main() printing exactly 'hello from app' and call it under the __main__ guard; (3) tests/test_app.py must contain a unittest TestCase asserting that running 'python3 src/app.py' outputs 'hello from app' (use subprocess); (4) docs/README.md must start with the line '# Demo Project'; (5) create .gitignore containing the line '__pycache__/'; (6) finally run 'python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -q' and make sure it passes.
